analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE - DKFZ validation cohort (n=33) not present locally. Local only contains Toronto cohort (n=108 GSE207207).
discrepancy_analysis:
A. REPORTED vs MODEL
- Reported (paper, Supp Fig 12d): LUMP score ANOVA comparison MPNST-G1 vs MPNST-G2 in DKFZ validation cohort, p < 0.0001.
- Model result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE - cannot compute because the DKFZ methylation cohort (n=33) is not present in the local data directory.

B. DATA INVENTORY CHECK
- Local data/supplementary directory contains: GSE207207 (Toronto methylation n=108), GSE207399 (10X snRNA-seq), GSE207400 (bulk RNA-seq), and Supplementary Data MOESM4-MOESM10.
- No DKFZ/Heidelberg methylation cohort files (would be derived from Koelsche et al. 2021 / DKFZ brain tumor classifier data, typically a separate GEO/EGA series not bundled here).
- The paper context explicitly states 'Validation cohorts: TCGA (n = 5) and DKFZ (n = 33) MPNST datasets' as external validation, and paper text confirms DKFZ is referenced as an external dataset (ref 10, 13).

C. PAPER CROSS-CHECK
- Supp Fig 12 (per paper_context.txt) reports LUMP scores Toronto (ANOVA p < 0.0001) and DKFZ (p < 0.0001) separately. The question asks specifically about the DKFZ cohort.
- The reported value (p < 0.0001) is plausible given the paper text; the issue is purely data availability on the local machine.

D. ROOT CAUSE
- Classification: 1:COHORT_FILTER_DIFFERENCE - the required external validation cohort (DKFZ n=33) is outside the locally provisioned data scope. This is a data-provisioning gap rather than an analytic error.
- The model correctly recognized that neither the raw beta matrix nor derived LUMP scores for DKFZ samples are present in the local files (GSE207207 series matrix only indexes the 108 Toronto PNSTs).

E. DISCREPANCY MAGNITUDE
- N/A quantitatively (no model value to compare). Categorically: unable to reproduce.

F. PROPOSED FIX
- Obtain the DKFZ MPNST methylation cohort (33 samples), typically from the Heidelberg DKFZ sarcoma/brain tumor reference cohort (Koelsche et al.) via EGA/GEO, compute LUMP scores from beta values at the 44 LUMP CpGs (Aran et al. 2015), then perform ANOVA of LUMP score by MPNST-G1 vs MPNST-G2 group membership in DKFZ.

G. CONFIDENCE
- HIGH confidence that data is unavailable (verified by listing the data directory). Cannot verify the reported p-value without the DKFZ cohort.
proposed_fix: Obtain DKFZ MPNST methylation cohort (n=33) from EGA/GEO (Heidelberg reference set), compute LUMP scores from 44 LUMP CpGs on beta values, then perform ANOVA of LUMP score by MPNST-G1 vs MPNST-G2 in DKFZ samples to verify p < 0.0001.
